programme.title: Rassemblance S4
programme.desc: Between France, Canada and Switzerland, Magloire Delcros-Varaud meets inspiring personalities who have chosen professions based on transmission and commitment. programme.title: Recycle the Rubbish
programme.desc: The Grimwades are looking at the rubbish they produce. There's plenty of it. Daddy explains sending it to a landfill is not a good idea. They need to find a solution to go green.

programme.title: What's that smell?
programme.desc: When the kids discover that Yoko is the cause of an awful smell, they have to convince him to take his very first bath!

programme.title: Tough Challenges
programme.desc: The Junior Vets are facing tough challenges and unusual tasks. From swimming with critically endangered sharks to performing tricky surgery on a dog's knee, the kids are trying to prove they've got what it takes to care for unwell animals.

programme.title: The Sin Bin
programme.desc: Ice hockey teammates Liam and Rais have the biggest match of the season against their fiercest rivals. Meanwhile, keen skater Kaira is going for her gold award, but little does she know that someone else in the family has also been practicing down at the rink.

programme.title: Noah's Ark
programme.desc: Five young adventurers travel to an area where rare animals are bred in Mokala National Park in South Africa. They discover the rock paintings of their ancient ancestors and follow their footsteps in search of wild animals.

programme.title: What's that smell?
programme.desc: When the kids discover that Yoko is the cause of an awful smell, they have to convince him to take his very first bath!

programme.title: The Musical Mystery
programme.desc: Addison and her classmates are tasked with playing a piece of music written by a local billionaire, who has promised to donate funding to the school's music program – but only if Addison can solve a musical puzzle and correctly fill in the blanks in the sheet music!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Fairy Frog
programme.desc: Addison's and Tess's fairy garden school project attracts a mysterious glowing frog, and while Alex thinks it's radioactive and Tess believes it's a magical fairy frog, Addison is determined to find the real answer to this amphibious mystery.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Knights
programme.desc: Little Lewis follows every step in order to achieve his dream. After completing a plethora of thankless tasks at a young age, he moves on to the rank of ‘squire.' A chance to demonstrate his bravery on the battlefield, in order to be knighted, at last.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Lucha Grandma
programme.desc: Addison and Alex are afraid that Mrs. Rorschach is being secretly intimidated by a shadowy pro wrestler named the Lucha Grandma and are determined to find out her identity and put a stop to her antics.

programme.title: Glass Jar
programme.desc: Hepi and Briko are using their creativity to make the best use of old glass jars.

programme.title: Pop Up Greeting Cards
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents the art of folding pop-up greeting cards, teenagers creating tech tents for the homeless, a cargo carrier that follows you, and a special coating for plastic bottles.

programme.title: The Legendary Ironfan
programme.desc: Regal Academy faces Shan Academy in a track-and-field competition. Hawk, Travis, and Astoria are beaten by LingLing, Princess IronFan's granddaughter. Rose must find LingLing's weakness: a love of frilly dresses, to save the day.

programme.title: Take Note of Musical Fractions
programme.desc: How can distinct sounds be formed? In this episode we learn about the key role that fractions play in denoting whole, half, and quarter notes. Can Eric compose his own cool song using nothing but fractions?

programme.title: Get Sporty
programme.desc: The Junior Vets get sporty, helping horses at a polo match! Magda, the mare, is just back from injury – will she make it through the game? Barnaby, the rabbit, needs surgery, and a Burmese python has the sniffles. Plus, Johnny and Inel meet a naughty, food-stealing dog.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.desc: Aparajita, a talented artist haunted by her past, crosses paths with Rakshit, a reserved businessman. Though he avoids romance, their unexpected connection might just lead to true love.

programme.desc: Un tour complet de l'actualité en direct : breaking news, sujets chauds, grandes tendances culture, santé, tech et environnement, pour ne rien manquer de l'actualité.

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un coup de projecteur sur un fait saillant de l'information du jour, mis en perspective pour en souligner les enjeux.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les infos qui font la une tout autour du monde : reportages, analyses, et correspondants aux quatre coins du globe pour un point complet de l'actualité.

programme.title: Dans les hebdos
programme.desc: Avec des reportages des correspondants sur le terrain et des interviews de personnalités phares, retrouvez l'actualité mondiale qui bouge et qui change. Toute l'actualité internationale avec les décryptages des journalistes de France 24.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: À l'affiche
programme.desc: Comment les cinéastes, les romanciers, les artistes racontent-ils le monde ? France 24 part à la rencontre d'une culture engagée dans son temps.

programme.title: E1 - The Ghost of the Mountains
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E1 - Meet the Jaguars
programme.desc: Head out into the Pantanal with Lizzie and the Onçafari team on the hunt for a missing dominant male jaguar. Monitor the battle between young hopefuls, like outsider Badalo, who want to usurp his power and win over Fera and the other local females.

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word
programme.desc: Get to know Fera, the Queen of the Pantanal, as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner. Then learn why Ferinha, another local female, struggles with motherhood as more males move in and threaten the youngsters.

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E1 - The Ghost of the Mountains
programme.desc: Navigate the harsh Mongolian wilderness with Dan as he searches for The Dude, the largest snow leopard ever recorded. Watch him battle hostile landscapes and uncertainty as he sheds light on the challenges that The Dude and other snow leopards face.

programme.title: E2 - To Catch a Legend
programme.desc: Sniff around The Dude’s territory with Dan and his team, who suspect that females may play a bigger role than they originally thought. Challenge previous research about snow leopard behaviour when Dan stumbles upon an unusual cluster of big cats.

programme.title: E2 - Mum's the Word

programme.title: E4 - The Queen is Back
programme.desc: Feel the heat as Lizzie and veterinarian Joares scramble to collar more jaguars amid storms, floods, and power outages. Try to pin down the elusive Badalo before his data-gathering tag drops off and meet a new female the team is eager to study.

programme.title: E1 - Trials of Olimba
programme.desc: Enter the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley, where shady woodlands and antelope-packed plains offer the perfect hunting grounds for an audacious female leopard named Olimba and the pack she must struggle to control.

programme.title: E4 - The Lost Prince
programme.desc: When Mizumu’s status drops during adolescence, his alpha female mother disowns him. Follow his challenging journey to find a new clan while overcoming the threats of charging hippos, hungry crocodiles, a pack of wild dogs, and a hyena-eating leopard.

programme.title: E2 - Saltwater Crocodile
programme.desc: Navigate a mangrove forest in Borneo with the saltwater crocodile, which is perfectly suited to life among the watery roots. Discover how this reptile uses the environment to regulate its temperature and why its epic patience makes it a super hunter.

programme.title: E1 - Arid Heart
programme.desc: From the vast, dry plains of the interior come some of Australia’s most recognized imagery, such as the monolithic red rock of Uluru and the bounding red kangaroo. But how did the arid center of the continent come to be?

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

Experiencing And Understanding The Art World
Why Chernobyl Still Isn't Over - 40 Years After The Worst Nuclear Disaster
programme.desc: On April 26, 1986, Reactor 4 at Chernobyl exploded, triggering the worst nuclear disaster in history. Forty years later, the exclusion zone remains too radioactive for human life, and the catastrophe's impact continues to ripple across Europe and beyond.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.desc: Enjoy the stage of 'Peek-a boo' held in all over the country.

programme.title: Fun With Japanese
programme.desc: Each episode focuses on a word as a theme, exploring its meaning and history while discovering the charm of Japanese language. The program also features dance performances of quotes from the world's great figures, visits schools to interact with children, and introduces classical performing arts and songs, making it enjoyable for both children and adults.

programme.title: Nyan-Chu! Space! Broadcasting!
programme.desc: Nyan-chu, a cat from the earth, introduces human lives and cultures to the aliens in outer space.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 4
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Dear Japan
programme.desc: Amid the issues that regional communities face, local people are rethinking about traditional values and exploring new ways to live together beyond generations. This is a travel documentary visiting affectionate lives of this country.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: A rumor emerges that a prestigious medical university has been lowering female applicants' exam scores. Reporter Hiba Kikuno (Matsumoto Wakana) begins investigating and zeroes in on board member Kanbayashi Harumi (Suzuki Honami), who deftly deflects every inquiry. As Hiba pushes closer to the truth, the two women - each shaped by injustices in a male‑dominated society - find their convictions in direct conflict. This social drama portrays women who confront systemic unfairness while pursuing their own hopes for happiness.

programme.title: E416 - Drone Rescue/Say Cheese!/Tale Of Two Teddies/Climbing Bean/Proposal Problem
programme.desc: Mr Bean uses Mr Paliwal’s new drone to help find his stolen car.

programme.title: E15 - A Fun Day At The Bowling Center/Umbrellas Are Easily
programme.desc: One of the pins at the bowling alley is the Bobobobobone. Shiro wants to play, but he has bigger responsibilities. Deca arrives and throws Shiro like a bowling ball.

programme.title: E370 - Pet Sheep/Sheep Joust/Foodie Phantoms
programme.desc: The Lemmings take Polaroid snapshots of themselves disguised outside the castle along with a sheep who poses with them.

programme.title: E421 - Precious Plant/Bin & Gone/Staycation/Funfair/Grandfather Clock
programme.desc: Mr Bean is watering Mr Paliwal’s precious plant while he’s on holiday… what could possibly go wrong?!

programme.title: E41 - A Sleepless Night/The Super Hero Catches A Cold/Run, Run Away, And Run After/The Myst
programme.desc: The pistol on a flower in the mountains is the Bobobobobone. Deca and Shiro must wake up all night as it only blossoms for a second.

programme.title: E8 - B. Ocean of Fear/When Wedding Bells Thaw/Freak City/The Duke of Nuts/An Ogre Named Do
programme.desc: Finn faces his biggest challenge yet - overcoming his fear of water.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called ''Premier bouclier'', a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: E3 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Classical Painting
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Museum of Art is home to a major collection of American and European works, from the Italian Renaissance to the world of contemporary art. Amongst the French painters, those of the classical period: Vigee Le Brun, Corot, Delacroix, Millet, Couture, Courbet, Puvis de Chavannes...

programme.title: E14 - Welsh Rarebit And Home Fries
programme.desc: Leila Albert interviews Philippe Frenoi, world champion welsh rarebit and chips fan. Together they prepare the dish that crowned him champion: a welsh rarebit revisited with pulled pork, served with chips.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E11 - Ursula Caruel/Tree Embolism/Langres Landscape
programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul

programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called ''Premier bouclier'', a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: E3 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Classical Painting
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Museum of Art is home to a major collection of American and European works, from the Italian Renaissance to the world of contemporary art. Amongst the French painters, those of the classical period: Vigee Le Brun, Corot, Delacroix, Millet, Couture, Courbet, Puvis de Chavannes...

programme.title: E14 - Welsh Rarebit And Home Fries
programme.desc: Leila Albert interviews Philippe Frenoi, world champion welsh rarebit and chips fan. Together they prepare the dish that crowned him champion: a welsh rarebit revisited with pulled pork, served with chips.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E11 - Ursula Caruel/Tree Embolism/Langres Landscape
programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E6 - Vesunna/Wendy Andreu/Alainpaul
programme.desc: A 4,000 square metre domus at the Vesunna Gallo-Roman Museum in Perigueux. Wendy Andreu structures each material with the same interest in creating unique objects. AlainPaul invites himself into a dance dressing room where clothes stretch and float. Jerome Clochard restores mosaics in Brittany.

programme.title: E12 - Julien Fournie
programme.desc: He's rewriting the rules for haute couture: Julien Fournie's autumn-winter 2023-2024 haute couture collection is called ''Premier bouclier'', a hymn to powerful femininity, offering a new take on military clothing.

programme.title: E3 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Classical Painting
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Museum of Art is home to a major collection of American and European works, from the Italian Renaissance to the world of contemporary art. Amongst the French painters, those of the classical period: Vigee Le Brun, Corot, Delacroix, Millet, Couture, Courbet, Puvis de Chavannes...

programme.title: E153
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E153
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. programme.title: E423
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 'Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world?' Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: A seemingly ordinary college girl finds herself reincarnated as a background extra in a romance novel, only to spend a night with the story's most dangerously obsessive male lead. A romantic fantasy with no brakes begins!

programme.title: E34
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. Then, Gecko & Grandma use rainwater to power a water wheel to recharge Green! The green inventions continue as Gecko builds a flying machine from junk, fixes a compost spreader & finds clever ways to save water at the garage!

programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. programme.title: E1 - Rainy Day Earth Week Fun
programme.desc: It's rainy day Earth Week fun with Little Baby Bum! Mia & Max help a spider climb the water spout & then splash in puddles when the rain stops! Then, they watch a caterpillar transform into a beautiful butterfly. The nature adventures continue as they listen to nocturnal animal sounds, build a bird bath & help ants collect crumbs for a picnic!

programme.title: The Legend Of Zu
programme.desc: Between the heaven and the Earth exist the Zu's mountain range, where live the immortals of Omei, the highest mountain of Zu, but the kingdom is in danger by Amnesia...

programme.title: Black Vengeance
programme.desc: Lee Ah Chai, a native Chiu Chow, a province of China. He was married with children of his own. He was rich, powerful and influential and he was the leading man in the underworld, virtually to as the ‘Big Boss'. But he was unhappy. After spending so many years involving with vice and crime, he was sick of this world and wanted to start his life anew. Some ten years ago, Chai had two side-kicks, Tang Kar Yung and Chan Ting Kok. Kok was adopted by Uncle Cut, the father of Yung. The two boys were raised up together and they were like brothers, if not by blood. But a misconception broke out which overshadowed the relationship amongst the three of them. It led Chai and Yung to divergence and the fight of Kok to Malacca...

programme.title: A True Mob Story
programme.desc: Cheung Dee, together with his best friends Long Life Chuen and Holy Sand, set up a valet parking counter outside a restaurant owned by a triad society he affiliates with. By accident, Cheung finds out that the son of his triad head, Tai Tze, is fiercely attacked by Song Bo. To save Tai's life, Cheung attacks Song and not only leaves a scar on Song's face, but also puts him in jail for five years which plants a seed of the revenge five years later. Form that moment, the only person that can cheer him up is his best girl friend Ruby. Yet, Cheung has his heart on Sandy, a young solicitor who helped set him free in an assault case. No sooner has their love relationship developed than Cheung's nightmare has begun......

E13
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E1 - David Attenborough: A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Climate change is our defining crisis, and it is happening even faster than we thought. But we're not powerless to stop it. The impacts of climate change are felt in every corner of the world. Increased temperatures are causing environmental disasters. The sea levels are rising, the Arctic is melting, coral reefs are dying, oceans are acidifying, and forests are burning. It is clear that business as usual is not an option. With climate change reaching irreversible heights, now is the time for bold collective action. The climate emergency is a race we are losing, but it is a race we can win.

programme.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When a visitor from beyond the stars – an impish and adorable alien called LU-LA – crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun soon sees an opportunity for alien-powered fun and adventure, and sets off on a mission to shepherd LU-LA back to her home... Little do the pair know, though, that they are being pursued at every turn by a mysterious alien-hunting government agency, spearheaded by the formidable Agent Red and her bunch of hapless, hazmat-suited goons. Can Shaun and the flock avert Farmageddon on Mossy Bottom Farm before it's too late?

programme.title: Happy End
programme.desc: Bora Choi, who works at an English language institute, is having an affair with her ex-lover, Il-Beom Kim. Her husband, Min-ki Seo, is a former banker. He has lost his job, and has taken over the domestic roles of the house: cooking, cleaning, and watching the baby. In his free time, he watches soap operas and reads romance novels. Min-ki is aware of the affair, but seems willing to put up with it and to continue living with his cheating wife. Bora is disturbed when Il-Beom seems to want to take their affair further and pushes past her boundaries, risking to expose their relationship.

programme.title: E16 - Out Of Time
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！
